name: plan-runner
description: An SDK chat panel that autonomously drives a master-plan project — one fresh Claude context window per step, right inside VS Code.

planRunner.pauseThresholdPct.description: Pause the loop when account usage reaches this % (applies to all windows).

planRunner.usagePollSeconds.description: How often (seconds) to poll `claude /usage` for the meter.

planRunner.finalizeQuietSeconds.description: After a step finishes, wait for this many seconds of no activity before starting the next step — gives the session time to commit/push and leaves its summary on screen. 0 = advance immediately.

commands.title: Plan Runner: Toggle Auto-Run for this Workspace
Plan Runner: Reinstall master-plan + next-step Skills

scripts.vscode:prepublish: echo 'no bundling yet — ships src + node_modules'
